## Entities.IRenderOptions.onInvalidTaskRef property

How to handle steps with invalid task references - 'ignore': Skip rendering, use empty or placeholder description - 'warn': Log warning, render with placeholder - 'fail': Return Failure result Default: 'warn'

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly onInvalidTaskRef?: ValidationBehavior;
```
